channel.title: security on Bhumish's Blog :tada:
channel.description: Recent content in security on Bhumish's Blog :tada:

item.title: Building an Effective Vulnerability Management Program
item.description: Unleashing the Risk Based Vulnerability Management, a security update to your traditional VM Process

item.title: Security Considerations for Smart Cameras
item.description: Designing smart-iot cameras? Read this to check out the security perpective

item.title: Your Eureka Forbes account can easily be hacked!
item.description: The website of Eureka Forbes has a security issue, which they are not ready to touch.

item.title: Bugs — Easy To Find, Tough To Report
item.description: Describing one scenario, showing how tough it is to report a bug when the company doesn’t have a VDP

item.title: Never Post A Picture Of Your Boarding Pass On Social Media
item.description: Posting your boarding pass on social media may seem like a cool thing to do, but here are a ton of reasons why you shouldn’t.

item.title: Fraud Android App in the name of Jio Prime
item.description: An Instagram page advertised about offering free Jio data if we install the Jio Prime app from their link. I did a static analysis of that application.

item.title: Login Bypass Vulnerability on a famous Indian Restaurant chain
item.description: I came across a login bypass vulnerability in a very famous food-chain’s Indian website

item.title: Bypass Root detection in Android - by modifying the APK
item.description: A trick on how to bypass the root-detection mechanism applied by any Android APK

item.title: UTI ITSL – Data Disclosure through a single key
item.description: Some PAN card (Indian govt card for tax purposes) details are getting leaked from the UTI website

item.title: SSL-TLS and Your Browser
item.description: A detailed explainer on how HTTPS works using SSL and TLS protocols

item.title: Common problems during initial Honeyd configuration
item.description: I faced and resolved some issues while working with HoneyD honeypot. This involved a lot of research on the interwebz, as this used to be a very niche utility.

item.title: Phishtank - the conventional tank of phishes
Creating a Data Recovery Agent
item.description: Data Recovery Agent is used in Enterprise Windows environment for using PKI to achieve Data Integrity and Confidentiality. This article explains on how to create one.

item.title: Creating a Trojan (Malware)
item.description: Creating a simple trojan to install in the victim system and connect back to our own machine

item.title: Why is it necessary to keep your email secure?
item.description: You need to keep your email as the most secure item, after your finances

item.title: Setting up Password-less SSH Connections
item.description: Short article explaining how to setup the Password-less SSH between two hosts

item.title: Common Network Security Threats
item.description: The most common threats faced by network devices today
